extension.description:
Zeus768's Kodi Addon Repository.
Available Addons: - Genesis - Stream Movies and TV Shows with torrent support - SALTS (Stream All The Sources) - 35+ scrapers, Free Streams, Autoplay, Up Next, Skip Intro, Trakt, Debrid Support - Trakt Player - Click and Play, Torrent-only, Debrid-powered (RD, PM, AD, TorBox) - Orion - Torrent and Usenet Indexer - Strike Zone - Sports Streaming Add-on - The Accountant - Kodi Maintenance and Debrid Management Tool - Genesis Themepak - Themes for Genesis - ResolveURL - URL Resolver Module
